results.title: ‘Chilling effect’: Kansas professors alarmed by new Regents definitions of CRT, DEI
results.description: Definitions of critical race theory and diversity, equity and inclusion, recently approved by the Kansas Board of Regents, worry some Kansas professors and academic freedom advocates who say they could create a chilling effect in classrooms.

results.title: Pakistan, China reaffirm commitment to deepen strategic partnership as Dar concludes visit
results.description: Dar said Pakistan and China agreed to further strengthen collaboration under CPEC 2.0

results.title: Javier Blas: Iran risks overplaying its hand on Hormuz
results.description: Let’s be honest. Iran has President Donald Trump in a headlock over the Strait of Hormuz. The White House is fighting to reopen a waterway that wasn’t closed before the conflict started. But Tehran risks overplaying its hand: If it...
